notes: R7 Phase C: LongMemEval-S subset (ref-mastra test-dataset.json). question_type=single-session-user. compactionPoint at mid-point (1) so the answer location is predictable wrt recap vs tail. Published baseline (OMEGA 95.4%, Memoria ~89%, RetainDB 79%) uses the full 500-question set — this 3-item subset is sanity, not direct head-to-head.

turns.content: Hi! My name is Alice and my favorite color is blue.
Hello Alice! It's nice to meet you. I'll remember that your favorite color is blue.

probes.question: What is my favorite color?
probes.criterion: Response must include the answer 'Blue' (or a clear paraphrase). Empty or contradictory answers fail. This is a single-session-user probe from LongMemEval-S.
